metadata.title: FOIA Nexus Workflow
metadata.description: Governance-to-automation relationships across FOIA Nexus subsystems

nodes.label: FOIA Master Reconciled 2025
nodes.description: Canonical, reconciled record spine feeding automation and dashboards.

nodes.label: FOIA PDF Intake
nodes.description: Extracts PDF content, performs exemption pre-tagging.

nodes.label: Agency Contacts Registry
nodes.description: Verified agency metadata, routing rules, escalation paths.

nodes.label: Colab Integrator
nodes.description: Colab pipeline that merges inputs, normalizes, and exports structured feeds.

nodes.label: GAS BatchOps
nodes.description: V8 batch write-back engine for Sheets + Drive updates.

nodes.label: Installable Trigger
nodes.description: Authorized time-based trigger orchestrating nightly runs.

nodes.label: LangChain Exemption Tagger
nodes.description: LLM-assisted classifier for FOIA exemption labeling.

nodes.label: FOIA Audit Logger
nodes.description: Timestamped activity ledger with token validation for chain-of-custody.

nodes.label: Transparency Dashboard
nodes.description: React/D3 force graph showing routing, backlog, and SLA health.

nodes.label: Workflow Audit Report
nodes.description: Automated semiannual compliance PDF with metrics and anomalies.

edges.relationship: Pass extracted text for exemption classification.
Supply tagged records for downstream normalization.
Publish reconciled dataset to the canonical spine.
Schedule and authorize nightly batch execution.
Hand off normalized payloads for in-sheet updates.
Apply batch write-backs and PDF report generation.
Emit execution telemetry and token signatures.
Serve data extracts for visualization refresh.
Feed compliance events into semiannual report.
